metadata.name: Clear Film Clip License for a Documentary

description: A documentary filmmaker wants to use a 30-second clip from a classic movie. An agent must secure the license.

nodes.task_description: Identify the studio that owns the rights to the classic movie.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the rights holder.

nodes.task_description: Contact the studio's licensing department with the specific clip details and request a quote.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent submits a formal request for a clip license.

nodes.task_description: Negotiate the fee and execute the licensing agreement.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finalizes the agreement and secures the right to use the clip.
